corrections.current: 87 σου καὶ τῆς βασιλείας σου ἕτερος ἕξει.
corrections.correct: σου καὶ τῆς βασιλείας σου ἕτερος ἕξει.

Transcript substitutes a different phrase; image clearly reads ἐψωμιζόμην.
Image appears to read λέοντος without accent distinction visible enough; leaving as uncertain would also be acceptable.

corrections.current: αι αμαρτιαι] αι ἀ ιο τας αι igniferius 87’
corrections.correct: αι αμαρτιαι] αι α ι οι τας αι igniferius 87’

Print shows three dots and no raised middle dot at end.

notes: Running head matches. Body is largely accurate except for captured line number at start and a substantive misread in 30a. Apparatus mostly matches but one 30 c entry is garbled in transcription.
